subcodes.title: Words spoken at 1815 California Street in San Francisco, 1912-10-10
subcodes.first_line: It was in the path of God, therefore it was not suffering, not trouble. You must strive in order that you may acquire the blessings of the Holy Spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
